ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "doc_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the document */,
  "doc_status" TEXT /* The current status of the document (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last modification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document this version belongs to */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when this version was created */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of this version */,
  "nID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who created this version */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* The user who approved the version (if applicable) */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_nID FOREIGN KEY ("nID") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last activity in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* The document the comment is associated with */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* The version of the document the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES document_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* The document the permission is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user the permission is granted to */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., viewer, editor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
